Late night thought: I hope you never doubt how wanted you are.
If you are sleepy, let this message tuck you in gently: you are loved, missed, and safe in my heart.
ሌሊት ሲሆን አንቺን የማስብበት ጊዜ ይበዛል። ደህና እደሪ ፍቅሬ ❤️
I hope your dreams are sweet tonight. If I appear in them, please tell dream-me to behave.
Tonight I am sending you peace, warmth, and one invisible kiss on your forehead.
Sleep knowing this: there is a heart far away that chooses you again and again.
The moon has nothing on you, but I respect its effort.
Good night, princess. I miss you in a soft, quiet, honest way.
